name: Fried Tortilla Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the 8 corn tortillas in a stack and cut into 6 equal wedges.
2. Pour about ½ inch of salad oil into a deep, 2 or 3-quart pan and set on medium-high to high heat.
3. When the oil is hot enough to make a piece of tortilla sizzle, add tortilla pieces, a handful at a time.
4. Stir gently to separate the pieces.
5. Cook until crisp (1 to 1-1/2 minutes).
6. Lift the chips from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
